title: Caramel Crunchy Fish Tacos
description: A sweet and crunchy twist on traditional fish tacos, perfect for a quick and easy dinner. This dish combines the flavors of Mexico with the freshness of the sea.
instructions: 2. Season the carp fillets with salt and pepper.
3. In a small bowl, mix together the caramel and 1 tablespoon of water to create a glaze.
4. Place the carp fillets in a baking dish and brush the glaze over the top of each fillet.
5. Bake the carp for 12-15 minutes or until cooked through.
6. Meanwhile, toast the crunchy topping in a skillet over medium heat.
7. Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
8. Assemble the tacos by placing a cooked carp fillet onto a tortilla, followed by a spoonful of crunchy topping and a sprinkle of cilantro.
